item.title: OfficialFPL: Fantasy Premier League @OfficialFPL · 25s Noah Okafor has scored in three of the last four Gameweeks he’s been available
item.description:
Fantasy Premier League @OfficialFPL · 25s Noah Okafor has scored in three of the last four Gameweeks he’s been available for
v Man Utd (GW32) v Brentford (GW31) v Chelsea (GW26) v Nottingham Forest (GW25)
The @LUFC midfielder missed Gameweeks 27-30 due to injury.
#FPL 1 2 21

item.title: AndyK_LivNews: James Pearce reposteó Andy Kelly @AndyK_LivNews · 3h Would be brilliant if we could get a big crowd along to try to help
item.description: James Pearce reposteó Andy Kelly @AndyK_LivNews · 3h Would be brilliant if we could get a big crowd along to try to help get the Reds to Wembley! It’s not often you play an FA Cup semi final on your own ground so don’t miss this opportunity. Early bird tickets available now at £8, £3 (young adults and over 65s) and £2.50 U16s. Cita Liverpool FC Women @LiverpoolFCW · 4h Our @AdobeWFACup semi-final fixture details are confirmed 25 90 22 mil

item.title: lateriser12: Lateriser12 @lateriser12 · 4min So good to have daylight savings ended for our sanity. 5 1 mil
item.description: Lateriser12 @lateriser12 · 4min So good to have daylight savings ended for our sanity. 5 1 mil

item.title: TheAthleticFC: The Athletic | Football @TheAthleticFC · 5min Leeds United haven't won in 18 league visits to Old Trafford - a run that
item.description:
The Athletic | Football @TheAthleticFC · 5min Leeds United haven't won in 18 league visits to Old Trafford - a run that stretches back to 1981 - but they have an early lead.
Dominic Calvert-Lewin missed a great chance early on, but they didn't have to wait long as Noah Okafor put the visitors in front after just five Mostrar más 2 4 32 6 mil
